input.background: Suppose that $X_1, X_2, \ldots, X_n$ are independent random variables, each with the uniform distribution on $[c-d, c+d]$ where $c$ and $d$ are both unknown $(-\infty<c<\infty, d>0)$. Additionally, given failure time data: $20,23,25,26,28,29,31,33,34$, and 35 days, assume the data follow a uniform distribution on [$c-d, c+d$].
input.question: Using the failure time data $20,23,25,26,28,29,31,33,34$, and 35 days, and assuming the data follow a uniform distribution on [$c-d, c+d$], use the maximum likelihood method to estimate the unknown parameters $c$ and $d$.
